div.p: Stack-based comparison semantics: pop two values, push boolean result (1.0/0.0)
Stack before comparison: [a, b] where b is on top Pop order: b first, then a Result pushed: 1.0 (true) or 0.0 (false)

ul.li: All other values (including 1.0, NaN, INFINITY) are truthy → jump not taken Truthy check: condition == 0.0 determines falsy
